svg.title: Poneglyph C4 container diagram
svg.desc: Deployed system view. A consultant uses a browser to reach the Next.js frontend on Vercel, which talks to the FastAPI backend on Railway. The backend orchestrates six agents that call the Anthropic Claude Opus 4.7 API and read or write a project memory filesystem.

g.text: FastAPI · uvicorn · Python 3.12 · running on Railway

svg.text: Frontend on Vercel · Backend on Railway · Source on GitHub
